workflow: runtime and hardware operational cockpit surfaces
steps: Selected Runtime from the mode rail.
Confirmed Audio, Visual, and Agent runtime cards are compact and expose collapsed Details controls.
Expanded Audio runtime Details and confirmed detail text is inspectable without crowding the viewport.
Selected Hardware from the mode rail.
Confirmed status, settings, learn targets, and bindings are laid out densely and remain readable.
Clicked Refresh, Start, a learn target, and Stop; observed MIDI/OSC statuses move to Listening and then back to Stopped, and Learn move through Learning and back to Idle.
Confirmed the workspace keeps global transport, panic, runtime status, side activity, and bottom runtime strip visible.

artifacts.label: runtime hardware cockpit screenshot
artifacts.note: Captured from Safari after exercising hardware refresh/start/learn/stop controls.

notes: Accessibility tree exposed Runtime details summaries and Hardware Refresh/Start/Stop, MIDI/OSC settings, Learn Targets, and Bindings controls.
No physical MIDI device was attached, so the MIDI input selector remained on No MIDI input; the available local listener and learn workflows were still exercised.
